title: Customer Revenue Leaderboard & Gamification Dashboard
problem_statement: It's hard to understand customer purchasing behavior and identify top performers across different cities, making it difficult to create effective incentive programs.
objective: Enable sales teams to identify top customers for gamification and incentive programs to encourage continued purchasing and loyalty.
audience: Sales teams and sales managers who need to track customer performance and implement incentive strategies.
metrics: Customer contribution percentage to their city's total revenue
Top 10 customer ranking by total revenue
Customer type (single city vs. multiple cities)
action_items: Identify top-performing customers for recognition and rewards
Create gamification programs to incentivize continued purchasing
Target specific customers with tailored incentive offers
Monitor customer performance trends over time
Focus sales efforts on high-potential customers in key cities
